chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D-7565 of 2021 Date Order with Signature of Judge 1. For order on CMA No. 2973/2025 (Urgent) 2. For hearing of main case 13-02-2025 Mr. Iqbal Hussain Advocate in person Mr. Sandeep Manlani, Assistant Advocate General 1. Urgency granted. 2. The prayer clause of this petition reads as follows:-. To direct the Respondents No. 4 and 5 to issue Lease Deed in respect of Property bearing Plot No. 149, Category LS, Sector 33-G (Area 100 square yards), Korangi Township, Karachi in favour of Petitioner after completion of the legal formalities and requirements. Prima facie the Petitioner seeks to assail title to immovable property through a writ petition and the same cannot be sanctioned. Even otherwise, the matter requires inquiry, investigation, evidence etc., in the very least and the same is not amenable to adjudicate in writ jurisdiction. Petition is found to be misconceived and is dismissed. beets Judge Judge Amjad PS
